product: Audit logs for request-for-access events are now emitted
tagline: Actions related to access request destinations (Public Preview) are now emitted in the audit logs.
what_it_does: Actions related to access request destinations (Public Preview) are now emitted in the audit logs. This page provides a comprehensive reference of available audit log services and events. By understanding which events are logged in the audit logs, your enterprise can monitor detailed Databricks usage patterns in your account.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Actions related to access request destinations (Public Preview) are now emitted in the audit logs. This page provides a comprehensive reference of available audit log services and events.
key_takeaway: Actions related to access request destinations (Public Preview) are now emitted in the audit logs.
